title: Crash using order by alias in subquery
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DOUBLE);
SELECT name, value AS val FROM t2 WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY val;
SELECT a.val FROM (SELECT name, value AS val FROM t2 ORDER BY value) AS a;
SELECT a.val FROM (SELECT name, value AS val FROM t2 ORDER BY val) AS a WHERE a.val > 15;
key_bug_features: Order by alias in subquery causes crash
